context: Tests whether the agent follows the Gift archetype from the skill — hero image-banner → tier comparison → 'How gifting works' 3-step → corporate CTA — and includes the main-page section in the correct position. Also checks premium dark + warm accents color tone guidance.

checklist.name: Hero image-banner present
checklist.description: templates/page.gift.json contains a section of type 'image-banner' as the first content section

checklist.name: Tier comparison section present
checklist.description: templates/page.gift.json contains a section of type 'multicolumn' or equivalent used to compare gift tiers/options (appears after the hero)

checklist.name: 3-step gifting process present
checklist.description: templates/page.gift.json contains a section with a 3-step 'how gifting works' process — exactly 3 steps (multicolumn with 3 columns, or equivalent)

checklist.name: Corporate CTA section present
checklist.description: templates/page.gift.json contains a section (rich-text or equivalent) serving as a corporate or bulk gifting CTA — appears after the tier comparison and gifting steps

checklist.name: Section ordering: tier comparison before 3-step
checklist.description: In the 'order' array, the tier comparison section appears before the 3-step gifting process section

checklist.name: Section ordering: 3-step before corporate CTA
checklist.description: In the 'order' array, the how-gifting-works section appears before the corporate CTA section

checklist.name: main-page section present
checklist.description: templates/page.gift.json contains a section of type 'main-page'

checklist.name: main-page between hero and campaign sections
checklist.description: In the 'order' array, the main-page section appears after the hero and before the tier comparison or campaign content sections

checklist.name: Dark color scheme on hero or CTA
checklist.description: At least one section (hero or corporate CTA) uses a dark color scheme (scheme-3, scheme-4, or any scheme with a dark tone — not scheme-1 or 'light')

checklist.name: shopify:// image URLs used
checklist.description: All image references in templates/page.gift.json use the 'shopify://shop_images/' prefix format (not relative paths, bare filenames, or https:// external URLs)

checklist.name: Valid JSON
checklist.description: templates/page.gift.json is valid JSON that can be parsed without errors
